projects.title: GoPrivate EDR
projects.description: An open-source, entirely on-device machine learning firewall for Android, built under the Project Trinity initiative. Architected exclusively by myself to perform real-time network traffic interception and threat scoring. This zero-cloud system bridges a C++ system-level JNI with heavily optimized local sequence models to detect anomalous network patterns and C2 communications without exposing any user data.

core_components: Native Packet Interceptor (C++ JNI) — Hooks directly into Android's VpnService API for zero-copy packet inspection at the OS level.
Lightweight Feature Extractor — Analyzes flow-level metadata (timing, packet sizes, entropy) to identify threats without decrypting or inspecting payload content.
Quantized Threat Classifier (TFLite) — INT8-quantized sequence model calibrated specifically for malware detection within tight mobile constraints.
Telemetry Hub — Local-only logging system equipped with cryptographic integrity checks to maintain secure forensic audit trails.
optimization_highlights: Implemented memory-safe tensor handling via custom arena allocators, completely eliminating OOM crashes during sustained heavy traffic bursts.
Compressed the ML model footprint to under 8MB through structured pruning and QAT, achieving sub-50ms inference latency on mid-tier hardware.
Designed a crash-resilient watchdog timer and state checkpointing system ensuring the firewall recovers instantly without dropping traffic.
privacy_guarantees: Absolute zero remote inference: 100% of ML execution is isolated in a native Android process.
Strict no-payload inspection policy ensures end-to-end user content privacy.

projects.title: Avani AI
projects.description: An advanced natural language perception engine for human-AI interaction. Built upon the custom V21.0-Lite architecture, it utilizes a highly optimized single-model, two-pass pipeline designed specifically to bypass the limitations of hardware-constrained edge deployments. It extracts deep semantic intent and conversational nuance without relying on multi-model distributed cloud clusters.

core_components: V21.0-Lite Pipeline — Single-model, two-pass RAG architecture optimized for extreme low-latency context retrieval and synthesis.
Intent Recognition Matrix — NLP-driven state machine that processes conversational semantics to extract precise user intent.
Semantic Chunking Engine — Dynamically parses, chunks, and indexes conversational history for highly accurate long-term recall.
Probabilistic Decision Layer — Bayesian network that fuses confidence scores from multiple NLP inference passes to generate context-aware dialogue actions.
optimization_highlights: The V21.0-Lite implementation drastically reduces memory overhead, allowing robust LLM orchestration entirely on-device.
Hardware-aware INT8 quantization preserves linguistic accuracy while maximizing token throughput on mobile and edge architectures.
Parallel processing pipeline decouples intent extraction, database retrieval, and generation stages.
privacy_guarantees: 100% On-device execution ensures conversational text vectors never leave the user's hardware.
Feature-level anonymization securely hashes embeddings before any optional cross-device syncing.

metrics.vram_target: Designed for deployment under 4GB VRAM limits

projects.title: Edubridge
projects.description: A comprehensive platform engineered for automated educational content generation and intelligent classroom API management. Leveraged rigid API endpoints, offline-first architectural patterns, and NLP-assisted curriculum generation to serve dynamic, highly scalable educational infrastructure.

core_components: NLP Curriculum Engine — Rule-based generation system featuring semantic topic sequencing and automatic difficulty adaptation for diverse learning paths.
Offline-First PWA Core — Service workers utilizing strategic caching, allowing full data submission capabilities in low-connectivity educational environments.
Real-Time Sync Layer — WebSocket-based state propagation managing live classroom dashboards with robust conflict resolution.
RBAC & Data Isolation — Row-level security implemented in PostgreSQL (Supabase) to guarantee strict tenant separation for multi-school deployments.
optimization_highlights: Database query optimization via composite indexes and materialized views, cutting dashboard rendering times from 2.1s to 340ms.
Graceful degradation protocols to ensure offline attendance and curriculum edits are queued with cryptographic signing for eventual synchronization.
Streamlined API endpoint design to handle complex nested JSON payloads efficiently.
security_measures: Strict rate-limiting and request signing deployed on all API endpoints to neutralize enumeration and injection attack vectors.
Secure authentication and data transport layers ensuring educational privacy compliance.

metrics.pwa_offline_support: Full operational capability with <50KB cache footprint
metrics.multi_tenant_scale: Tested with 50+ concurrent classrooms, <200ms P95 API latency

about.short: AI Researcher & Security Architect forging secure, hardware-optimized, crash-resilient edge systems.
about.full:
I am an AI Researcher and Security Architect dedicated to engineering secure, explainable, and resilient architectures that execute strictly on-device. My work focuses heavily on deep NLP logic, V21.0-Lite single-model RAG pipelines, and hardware-aware quantization tailored for consumer-grade environments, ensuring system intelligence never compromises user privacy or operational performance.

I operate on the philosophy of mathematics-driven security and transparent infrastructure that survives real-world failure modes. Whether I am architecting the GoPrivate Android EDR entirely solo from C++ JNI upward, or orchestrating autonomous LLM workflows, my focus remains locked on zero-remote inference and unyielding system integrity.

Currently pursuing my B.Tech in AI & ML at IEM Kolkata (Batch of 2024-2028), I am actively expanding the boundaries of open-source cyber-defense and natural language processing at the absolute edge.
values: Security forged through mathematical rigor, not obscurity
Zero-remote inference as the ultimate privacy boundary
Optimization driven by real-world hardware constraints
Uncompromising crash-resilience over rapid feature velocity
Explainable AI logic over black-box predictive models
